message:
I am thinking...: I have created the core files for the restaurant management application. Now I need to ensure the project is ready to run. I will check the `package.json` to see if all dependencies are listed and then install them. After that, I will run a build or start the development server to verify the setup.

Wait, I should check if I have created all the necessary files. Based on the scratchpad, I have created:
- package.json, tsconfig.json, next.config.js, prisma/schema.prisma
- src/app/layout.tsx, src/app/page.tsx, src/app/globals.css, src/app/api/auth/[...nextauth]/route.ts
- src/app/api/restaurants/route.ts, src/app/api/menu/route.ts, src/app/api/orders/route.ts, src/app/dashboard/page.tsx
- src/app/menu/page.tsx, src/app/orders/page.tsx, src/app/auth/login/page.tsx, src/app/auth/register/page.tsx
- src/components/MenuItemForm.tsx, src/components/OrderTable.tsx, src/middleware.ts, .env.example
- src/components/Navbar.tsx, src/components/RestaurantCard.tsx

This seems to cover the requirements. I will now install the dependencies.
